loops.name: Structural Integrity Loop
loops.purpose: Keep routed chapter surfaces resolvable and schema-consistent.
loops.signal_source: Spine validators, chapter-manifest.yaml, routed chapter files, and path checks.
loops.next_action: Repair manifest paths, missing routed files, invalid metadata, or validator failures.
loops.failure_boundary: Broken paths, missing required files, invalid schema, or validator failures are hard failures.

loops.name: Source Fidelity Loop
loops.purpose: Preserve exact transcript bodies and quote-grade boundaries.
loops.signal_source: Transcript fidelity metadata, transfer-authority comparisons, and transcript substrate checks.
loops.artifact: spine health reports and transcript validators
loops.next_action: Use explicit transcript-fidelity workflow before repairing curated transcript bodies.
loops.failure_boundary: Guardrail review must not mutate transcript bodies.

loops.name: Interpretive Constraint Loop
loops.purpose: Keep high-risk interpretation bounded, source-statused, and reviewable.
loops.signal_source: Known-risk seeds, heuristic flags, limits sections, and date-sensitive language.
loops.next_action: Work the highest-priority guardrail queue, then regenerate reports.
loops.failure_boundary: Review-depth gaps remain warnings; public terminology leakage and unsupported confidence must be corrected.

loops.name: Orientation Coherence Loop
loops.purpose: Keep civ-ph entries aligned with chapters, payloads, placement weights, limits, and return paths.
loops.signal_source: civ-ph validator, orientation validator, manifest civ_ph_path, and entry frontmatter.
loops.next_action: Update civ-ph or orientation payloads only where alignment fails.
loops.failure_boundary: civ-ph remains orientation, not transcript, source substitute, endorsement, or second commentary.

loops.name: Cross-Surface Routing Loop
loops.purpose: Keep corridors, media packs, reports, registries, and export surfaces mutually navigable.
loops.signal_source: Cross-volume validators, media-pack validators, report generation, and export-readiness checks.
loops.artifact: cross-volume registry, media-pack corpus, and improvement-loop report
loops.next_action: Repair missing routing/report surfaces, then run cross-volume and media-pack validation.
loops.failure_boundary: Corridors and media packs orient study; they do not prove causal claims or override chapter source status.
